A shell script to map addresses to line numbers in the snowy_boot.elf executable.

# Purpose
This script is a shell executable that uses the `arm-none-eabi-addr2line` tool to convert addresses into file names and line numbers. It is specifically configured to work with the `build/snowy_boot.elf` executable file. The script takes a single argument, which is the address to be translated. This functionality is useful for debugging purposes, allowing developers to trace back to the source code location corresponding to a given address in the ELF file.
